---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---
```{=html}
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Syne:wght@400;700;800&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">

<div style="padding:4rem 6vw;max-width:820px;margin:0 auto;">

  <!-- En-tête -->
  <div style="margin-bottom:3.5rem;">
    <span class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.6rem;">// soumettre</span>
    <h1 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:clamp(1.9rem,4vw,2.8rem);font-weight:800;color:#0f172a;margin:.4rem 0 .8rem 0;">
      Montre ce que tu construis.
    </h1>
    <p style="color:#94a3b8;font-size:.95rem;line-height:1.85;max-width:500px;margin:0;">
      Tu es praticien tech ? Soumets ton profil, un article ou une réalisation.
    </p>
  </div>

  <!-- 3 cartes de sélection -->
  <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(220px,1fr));gap:1rem;margin-bottom:3rem;">

    <!-- Profil -->
    <div id="card-profil" class="submit-card" onclick="showForm('profil')">
      <div class="submit-icon" style="background:rgba(14,165,233,.1);">👤</div>
      <p class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.5rem;font-size:.65rem;">01</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;margin:0 0 .4rem 0;">Mon profil</h3>
      <p style="font-size:.82rem;color:#475569;line-height:1.6;margin:0;">Figurer dans l'annuaire des praticiens.</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Article -->
    <div id="card-article" class="submit-card" onclick="showForm('article')">
      <div class="submit-icon" style="background:rgba(249,115,22,.1);">✍️</div>
      <p class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.5rem;font-size:.65rem;">02</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;margin:0 0 .4rem 0;">Un article</h3>
      <p style="font-size:.82rem;color:#475569;line-height:1.6;margin:0;">Partager un article publié sur Medium, LinkedIn, Dev.to…</p>
    </div>

    <!-- Réalisation -->
    <div id="card-realisation" class="submit-card" onclick="showForm('realisation')">
      <div class="submit-icon" style="background:rgba(16,185,129,.1);">🚀</div>
      <p class="f-label" style="margin-bottom:.5rem;font-size:.65rem;">03</p>
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;margin:0 0 .4rem 0;">Une réalisation</h3>
      <p style="font-size:.82rem;color:#475569;line-height:1.6;margin:0;">Pipeline, dashboard, API, bootcamp, chaîne YT…</p>
    </div>

  </div>

  <!-- Zone formulaire -->
  <div id="form-zone" style="display:none;">

    <hr class="f-hr" style="margin-bottom:2rem;">

    <span id="form-label" class="form-step-label"></span>

    <!-- Gate : as-tu déjà un profil ? -->
    <div id="gate-profil" class="gate-box" style="display:none;">
      <h3 style="font-family:'Syne',sans-serif;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:700;color:#0f172a;margin:0 0 .4rem 0;">Tu as déjà un profil sur from0tohero.dev ?</h3>
      <p style="font-size:.83rem;color:#94a3b8;margin:0 0 1.75rem 0;">Un profil est requis pour lier ta soumission à un praticien.</p>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:.75rem;flex-wrap:wrap;">
        <button class="btn-f btn-f-primary" onclick="gateAnswer(true)" style="font-size:.72rem;">Oui, j'ai un profil →</button>
        <button class="btn-f btn-f-secondary" onclick="gateAnswer(false)" style="font-size:.72rem;">Non, je n'en ai pas encore</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Rappel après profil -->
    <div id="reminder-banner" class="reminder-box" style="display:none;">
      <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.73rem;color:#0ea5e9;margin:0;letter-spacing:.05em;line-height:1.6;">
        Remplis le formulaire ci-dessous · Une fois soumis, clique sur Continuer.
      </p>
      <button class="btn-f btn-f-sky" onclick="goToNext()" style="font-size:.7rem;padding:.6rem 1.2rem;">
        ✓ J'ai soumis mon profil → Continuer
      </button>
    </div>

    <!-- Tally embed.js -->
    <script src="https://tally.so/widgets/embed.js"></script>

    <!-- Iframes Tally -->
    <iframe id="tally-profil"
      style="display:none;width:100%;border:none;border-radius:12px;min-height:600px;"
      src="https://tally.so/embed/GxLlv2?hideTitle=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1"
      loading="lazy">
    </iframe>

    <iframe id="tally-article"
      style="display:none;width:100%;border:none;border-radius:12px;min-height:600px;"
      src="https://tally.so/embed/BzZ7zA?hideTitle=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1"
      loading="lazy">
    </iframe>

    <iframe id="tally-realisation"
      style="display:none;width:100%;border:none;border-radius:12px;min-height:600px;"
      src="https://tally.so/embed/q4OVLk?hideTitle=1&transparentBackground=1&dynamicHeight=1"
      loading="lazy">
    </iframe>

  </div>

  <p style="font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;font-size:.7rem;color:#94a3b8;margin-top:3rem;line-height:1.8;">
    Délai de publication : 48h max.
  </p>

</div>

<script>
let activeForm = null;

function showForm(type) {
  ['profil','article','realisation'].forEach(t => {
    const c = document.getElementById('card-' + t);
    c.classList.remove('selected');
  });
  document.getElementById('card-' + type).classList.add('selected');
  activeForm = type;

  ['profil','article','realisation'].forEach(t => {
    document.getElementById('tally-' + t).style.display = 'none';
  });
  document.getElementById('gate-profil').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('reminder-banner').style.display = 'none';

  if (type === 'profil') {
    document.getElementById('form-label').textContent = '01 — Soumettre mon profil';
    document.getElementById('tally-profil').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('form-zone').style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    const labels = { article: '02 — Soumettre un article', realisation: '03 — Soumettre une réalisation' };
    document.getElementById('form-label').textContent = labels[type];
    document.getElementById('gate-profil').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('gate-profil').dataset.target = type;
    document.getElementById('form-zone').style.display = 'block';
  }

  document.getElementById('form-zone').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}

function gateAnswer(hasProfile) {
  const type = document.getElementById('gate-profil').dataset.target;
  document.getElementById('gate-profil').style.display = 'none';

  if (hasProfile) {
    document.getElementById('tally-' + type).style.display = 'block';
  } else {
    document.getElementById('form-label').textContent = '01 — Crée ton profil d\'abord';
    document.getElementById('tally-profil').style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('reminder-banner').dataset.next = type;
    document.getElementById('reminder-banner').style.display = 'flex';
    ['profil','article','realisation'].forEach(t => document.getElementById('card-' + t).classList.remove('selected'));
    document.getElementById('card-profil').classList.add('selected');
    activeForm = 'profil';
  }
}

/* Écoute la soumission Tally via postMessage */
window.addEventListener('message', function(e) {
  let data = e.data;
  if (typeof data === 'string') { try { data = JSON.parse(data); } catch(err) { return; } }
  if (!data || data.type !== 'tally-form-submitted') return;
  const banner = document.getElementById('reminder-banner');
  const nextType = banner.dataset.next;
  if (nextType && activeForm === 'profil') goToNext();
});

function goToNext() {
  const type = document.getElementById('reminder-banner').dataset.next;
  if (!type) return;
  document.getElementById('reminder-banner').dataset.next = '';
  document.getElementById('reminder-banner').style.display = 'none';
  document.getElementById('tally-profil').style.display = 'none';

  const labels = { article: '02 — Soumettre un article', realisation: '03 — Soumettre une réalisation' };
  document.getElementById('form-label').textContent = '✓ Profil enregistré — ' + labels[type];
  document.getElementById('tally-' + type).style.display = 'block';

  ['profil','article','realisation'].forEach(t => document.getElementById('card-' + t).classList.remove('selected'));
  document.getElementById('card-' + type).classList.add('selected');
  activeForm = type;

  document.getElementById('form-zone').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
}
</script>
```
